sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_greatest (a UInt8, b UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
UPDATE test_greatest SET b = greatest(a, b) WHERE a > b;
SELECT a, b, greatest(a, b) AS greatest_value FROM test_greatest;
SELECT greatest(toUInt8(5), toDateTime32(now() + toIntervalHour(2)), '4') AS max_value;
